name: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking + Polar Express (82.13ms/step)
blurb: Systems optimization: 3.1% faster training (82.13ms vs 84.76ms) via Parameter Banking, Polar Express (arXiv:2505.16932), and Parallel Muon (no DDP, post-backward reduce-scatter + local PE + async all-gather). 7,306 steps in 600s. Int6 sliding window val_bpb 1.1238. Built on PR #315 by @jfprincz.
author: abaybektursun
